rulings.Case Title: TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA A VS. SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER CO A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, February 1, 2011, line 1. DEFENDANT SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny as a matter of law. Equitable subrogation cause of action survives insured's voluntary settlement. Allstate, 77 Cal. App. 4th 912. =(302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA A VS. SUPERIOR AUTOMATIC SPRINKLER CO A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, February 1, 2011, line 1. PLAINTIFF TRAVELERS PROPERTY CASUALTY COMPANY OF AMERICA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny, failure to maintain summary judgment burden. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate with competent evidence that defendant was the actual cause of the damages. =(302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN LUM ARCHITECTURE, INC VS. ARGYLE INVESTMENT PARTNERS, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, February 1, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANTS ASIA SF, LLC, GREGORY LOCKAMY, WILBUR YOUNG, LARRY HASHBARGER'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer overruled as to 5th and 6 causes of action - intentional and negligent misrepresentation properly alleged. =(302/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN ROBERT COOK VS. AMPM LOGISTICS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, February 1, 2011, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT FREEMAN DECORATING SERVICES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is overruled on grounds that the cross complaint against Freeman is based on Freeman's action in employing Cook and is part of the series of transactions involved with this case. See C.C.P. 428.10 b. =(302/AJR)
